title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.710 - Water supply — protection of sources
text:
71.710.  Water supply — protection of sources. — Such cities shall have the power and authority by ordinance to provide for the protection of all springs, wells or other sources of water supply described in section 71.700 from contamination or danger of contamination.
(RSMo 1939 § 7354) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7203; 1919 § 8683; 1909 § 9560
